title: Bitter Velvety Argentinian Tripe Stir-fry
description: This show-off Argentine dish features tripe in a bitter and velvety sauce, ideal for those who enjoy Mediterranean flavors with hints of boldness. The roasted tripe is cooked at safe temperatures to ensure safety.

ingredients.name: Tongue
ingredients.notes: Soak in water for at least an hour before use.

instructions: Prepare the tongue by soaking it in water for at least an hour. Pat dry and cut into cubes.
In a large pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until soft.
Add tongue, thyme, red pepper flakes, cumin, paprika, and saffron to the pan. Stir well to coat the tongue with spices.
Pour in enough water to cover the tongue completely. Bring to a boil then reduce heat to low, cover, and let simmer for 1 hour or until the tongue is tender.
Add salt to taste and continue to simmer for another 30 minutes. Remove from heat and serve hot over crusty bread.
